\"USE_LR_SCHEDULE = True\",\"old\":\"USE_LR_SCHEDULE = False\",\"op\":\"replace_exact\",\"source\":\"\",\"text\":\"\"},{\"anchor\":\"\",\"function\":\"build_scheduler\",\"new\":\"\",\"old\":\"\",\"op\":\"replace_function\",\"source\":\"def build_scheduler(optimizer: optim.Optimizer, steps_per_epoch: int):\\n    if not USE_LR_SCHEDULE:\\n        return None\\n    total_steps = TRAIN_MAX_STEPS if TRAIN_MAX_STEPS is not None else steps_per_epoch * 100\\n    total_steps = max(1, int(total_steps))\\n    return optim.lr_scheduler.CosineAnnealingLR(optimizer, T_max=total_steps)\",\"text\":\"\"}],\"primary_mode\":\"summaries\",\"rationale\":\"Use the fixed-step budget directly in the LR schedule so decay actually occurs within 256 updates; pair with a modest LR increase to improve early optimization under the short horizon.\",\"secondary_modes\":[\"topk\"]}"}}
